sub: Every _project/ artifact is one ProjectEntity — Identity · State · Relation, reduced from five per-kind interfaces to three primitives. The center is the contract; the petals mix entity kinds (decisions · reports · sessions) with the project's Claude Code control surface (workflows · hooks · commands). Project-agnostic: the kinds, enums, layout, and copy all come from a per-project config.
axis: 1 CONTRACT → 6 KINDS → VALIDATOR · SCAFFOLDER · GUARD → DERIVED DASHBOARD
sourceLine: source-of-truth: schema/project-entity.base.schema.json + project-system's validated _project/ entities · generated by tools/render-hub.mjs
strategy: One contract, three primitives, many disposable renderers — the planning layer reduced the way a UI reduces to State and Relation. A good reduction deletes fields; this one dropped five interfaces to three.

domains.name: ProjectEntity
domains.note: One non-optional contract every _project/ file derives from — Identity (kind·id·title) · State (status·updated) · Relation (links). kind & id are loader-derived from the path; the authored surface is just title/status/updated (+links/tags). The validator, scaffolder, guard, and this dashboard all read this single source.

domains.name: Hooks
domains.note: Two Claude Code hooks enforce the contract at the edges of a session — a blocking guard on every write, an advisory health check when a session opens. (Rendering isn't a hook; it's the Command Center's Vite plugin.)

domains.name: Field Guide
domains.note: The Field Guide — a self-serve map of how this system is structured and named. The framework anatomy (schema/ · lib/ · tools/ · hooks) is authored; the _project/ surface and naming conventions are derived live from this config, so the guide can't drift. Open the Field Guide tab for the full expandable tree.

entries.desc: kind "decision" · serial · 4-digit · status: proposed · accepted · superseded · rejected
kind "pipeline" · slug · status: design · qualify · build · ship · archive · shelved
kind "roadmap" · slug · status: proposed · active · superseded · complete
kind "session" · date-slug · <date>-<slug> · status: planned · active · blocked · completed · shelved
kind "workflow" · slug · status: draft · active · deprecated
the universal contract + the config meta-schema
the md parser + the contract seam (loadContract)

domains.name: Commands
domains.note: The project's slash commands — one generic /new <kind> scaffolder that writes valid frontmatter and self-validates against the config.

entries.desc: Scaffold a new _project/ entity of any kind — decision · report · pipeline · roadmap · session · workflow

domains.name: Workflows
domains.note: Operating workflows the Command Center replays as swimlanes — the authoring loop plus any entity that declares a ## Workflow block.

banner.text: Self-sustaining: new files are born valid, invalid writes are blocked at save time — for any project that supplies a config.
